name: osdu-quality-workflow
description: Test osdu-quality skill — test reliability analysis, flaky test detection, pass rates

steps.name: test-reliability
steps.prompt: how reliable are the partition service tests? anything flaky?

assertions.description: Uses osdu-quality for test reliability analysis
Does NOT confuse with osdu-activity (pipeline status)

steps.name: pass-rate-breakdown
steps.prompt: show me a pass rate breakdown by cloud provider for the search service

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: who's been reviewing the most MRs for search this month?

assertions.description: Routes to osdu-engagement for reviewer analysis (not quality)
